style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled ONE QUEUE: a long line of small work items waits at a single narrow gate labelled IT. RIGHT panel labelled MANY BUILDERS: four small workbench boxes each labelled BUILDER with a small toolkit icon, building in parallel beneath a horizontal bar labelled CENTRAL CONTROLS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled ONE QUEUE: a long line of small work items waits at a single narrow gate labelled IT. RIGHT panel labelled MANY BUILDERS: four small workbench boxes each labelled BUILDER with a small toolkit icon, building in parallel beneath a horizontal bar labelled CENTRAL CONTROLS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
